title: Costruire una Internal Developer Platform: GitOps, Multi-Tenancy e astrazione dei servizi
description:
In questo talk presenteremo un caso pratico di costruzione di una Internal Developer Platform partendo da un’infrastruttura IaaS e da servizi gestiti, introducendo un layer di piattaforma dichiarativo, automatizzato e guidato da GitOps.

Utilizzando Kubernetes come runtime cloud-native e GitOps come modello di controllo, vedremo come astrarre le risorse infrastrutturali sottostanti — indipendentemente dal cloud provider — in primitive di piattaforma pensate per gli sviluppatori, abilitate al self-service e governate da policy-as-code.

Approfondiremo l’architettura di una IDP basata su Kubernetes e control plane dichiarativi, la gestione del multi-tenancy con isolamento, sicurezza e governance integrata, l’astrazione dei servizi infrastrutturali in “golden path” applicativi e la prevenzione del drift tramite GitOps.

L’obiettivo è mostrare come una Internal Developer Platform non sia un insieme di tool, ma un prodotto interno progettato per ridurre il cognitive load degli sviluppatori, mantenendo sicurezza, compliance e resilienza by design.
fact: Caso pratico: costruzione di una Internal Developer Platform multi-tenant con Kubernetes e GitOps, usando Aruba Cloud come esempio concreto ma applicabile a qualsiasi cloud provider.

title: The operator's mindset: customize Kubernetes for your applications
description:
Kubernetes has become the de facto standard for container orchestration. Its standardized APIs enable consistent application deployment across different environments, whether on public cloud or bare metal.
Beyond just running workloads, Kubernetes offers powerful extensibility, allowing the platform to adapt to your applications, manage their lifecycles, and automate operations.

In this talk, we will explore how our applications can take full advantage of the Kubernetes orchestration platform, by extending its APIs with Custom Resources and developing Kubernetes operators customizing its behavior.
However, to build a Kubernetes operator, you must think as an operator, act as an operator!
We will walk through the core concepts and components behind operators, and together, we will build a real Kubernetes-native application step by step.
fact: Live demo: building a Kubernetes operator from scratch for real-world applications.

title: Kubernetes Like Lego: Building the New Standard for European Cloud APIs
description: Kubernetes has become a benchmark for cloud innovation. This session explores how a Kubernetes-based approach was used to design and implement SECA’s advanced cloud APIs, strengthening digital infrastructure. Practical use cases highlight the benefits of this architecture and the importance of the open-source community in its evolution. Kubernetes is presented not just as a technical tool, but as the foundation for the next level of cloud innovation.
fact: Showcased multi-cloud federation and AI workload mobility with Aruba Managed Kubernetes and Liqo.

title: Beyond cloud borders with Aruba Managed Kubernetes and Liqo
description: Aruba Managed Kubernetes and Liqo offer new ways to address multi-cloud and AI challenges. Aruba Managed Kubernetes simplifies deployment and ensures security and high availability. Liqo enables multi-cloud federation, effective resource management, and workload mobility. Together, they optimize the AI value chain, enable GPU sharing, and manage complex cloud architectures, increasing efficiency and opening new paths for innovation in the hybrid cloud space.
fact: Explored how Kubernetes APIs and open source community drive the next standard for European cloud innovation.
